final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) cover image featuring the DJI Pocket 4 product, targeting amateur creator aesthetic.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu amateur creator aesthetic, casual flat-lay photography style, playful and approachable visual language
Composition: 3x3 grid layout (nine-square format), product centered, title prominently placed in middle section
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 handheld gimbal camera as hero product, clean product shot with soft shadows
Scene/backdrop: clean minimal surface (white or light wood desk), subtle lifestyle props suggesting content creation
Color palette: soft pastel base with warm neutral accents, product color as visual anchor
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验"
Constraints: must work as 3:4 vertical cover image for Xiaohongshu feed; title typography must be cute and differentiated from standard fonts; maintain amateur/素人 authenticity without looking over-produced
Avoid: stock photo aesthetic; overly polished commercial look; generic sans-serif fonts; cluttered background; 8K stuffer language
